name: Kindergarten World Politics & Global Affairs — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for rules, fairness, helpers, and how groups make choices. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with rules, fairness, helpers, and how groups make choices.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about rules, fairness, helpers, and how groups make choices through a close look at rules, fairness, helpers, and how groups make choices.
